name: Capel-y-ffin to Bal Mawr
highlights: Remote moorland summit above Capel-y-ffin — arguably the quietest top in Wales.
points_of_interest: Capel-y-ffin monastery (ruins); Eric Gill artists' colony; Llanthony hermitage links
viewpoints: Gospel Pass; Vale of Ewyas; Black Mountains ridge
picnic_spots: Near Bal Mawr summit on grass
food_drink_nearby: The Grange Capel-y-ffin (B&B — check opening); Half Moon Llanthony
hazards_notes: Very narrow Gospel Pass road; navigation in mist challenging
